violations.text: The following were observed in poor repair: 1) Chest cooler door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. 2) Hand-wash sink was not operable, was taken out of service prior to inspection. Per interview with PIC, part has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The wall in the ware washing area has an accumulation of black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The ceiling in the warewashing area is in poor repair, inspector observed peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
Inspector observed light shield in ware washing area cracked with missing pieces. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
The door to the toilet room adjacent to the kitchen is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The grout and tile in the dishwasher area are in poor repair. Tile is broken and floor needs to be regrouted. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Working containers used for chemicals (spray bottles) taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
Milk chest cooler located in the kitchen was not in good repair (frayed gasket). New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan near the cookline, ice machine, inside of the chest coolers, and the freezer have an accumulation of dust, biofilm, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
